title: carex subandrogyna
intro: Carex subandrogyna, also known as the sub-androgynous sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family that is native to certain parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex subandrogyna include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness.
